_note: Ordered list of modules the shell loads. The shell dynamic-imports each module's module.js and slots them into the grid in array order. Adding a new module = drop in docs/modules/<id>/ + add an entry here. Modules with `requires_admin: true` only load for users whose auth file has is_admin=true. The per-user data repo URL no longer lives here — each user's auth file in worktrace-auth carries their own `data_repo` field, which is what `shellApi.fetchMyData()` reads from.
